description: Composition Black jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck, long sleeves with elasticated cuffs and hem, full front zipper, side pockets and embroidered branding on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Enjoy the winter evenings in style with hot street food in this fabulous jacket from fila. Crafted from polyester fabric, this jacket is designed to trap your body heat and keep you warm, while the long sleeves with elasticated cuffs keeps the winter chill at bay. Layer it over jeans and t-shirts. Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
